overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a first-person perspective walk through a muddy, foggy frontier town street. The player approaches and examines a deceased character on the ground before continuing down the street past horse-drawn carriages and pedestrians, eventually approaching a streetcar at an intersection.

wooden telegraph/utility poles lining the street with crossbars and wires
row of leafy green trees with white-painted trunks lining the left side of the street
wet cobblestone sidewalk with puddles reflecting the overcast sky
deceased character lying on the ground near the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a narrow, muddy sidewalk beside a large brick building. The street is lined with utility poles and trees, and the atmosphere is foggy and overcast. The camera approaches a dead body lying on the wet cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: body examination site at sidewalk edge

events.description: character examines and loots the deceased body on the ground

agents.ego_description: crouching down and examining the deceased character, moving around the body to inspect items

notable_agents.action: deceased character lying face-down on the ground with a hat nearby

entered.detail: tan-colored hat lying on the ground next to the deceased
grassy area between the sidewalk and the building wall
woman in a blue dress standing near the building corner in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses on the dead body lying on the ground at the edge of the sidewalk. The character crouches to examine the deceased, with a hat lying nearby on the cobblestones. A woman in a blue dress becomes visible standing near the building corner in the background as the camera circles the body.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy town street with passing horse carriages

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left side of the street
camera passes the stop sign and continues down the muddy street

agents.ego_description: walking down the muddy street past pedestrians and horse-drawn carriages, observing the frontier town environment

horse-drawn carriage with driver moving along the muddy road

entered.detail: black horse-drawn carriage with wooden wheels and driver
octagonal stop sign mounted on a pole at the street corner
corner of the brick building with stone detailing

segments.scene_description: The character stands up and continues walking down the muddy street, passing the woman in blue standing near the building corner. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left. The camera moves past a stop sign and continues along the wet, tree-lined street with utility poles visible.

events.description: streetcar comes into view at the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection where a streetcar is visible, continuing to explore the muddy town streets

notable_agents.action: streetcar tram stationary or moving slowly at the muddy intersection

entered.detail: dark-colored streetcar with windows and overhead lines at the intersection
muddy intersection where multiple streets meet

segments.scene_description: The camera continues down the wide, muddy street toward an intersection. A streetcar becomes visible in the distance, sitting at the muddy crossroads. The surroundings include more brick buildings and trees as the character approaches the intersection, with the streetcar becoming more prominent in the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy, overcast frontier town, moving from a grim discovery on a narrow sidewalk toward a bustling street intersection. It begins by walking along a muddy path beside a large brick building, where the camera slows and crouches to examine a deceased body and a fallen hat on the wet cobblestones. As the camera rises and circles the scene, a woman in a blue dress appears near a building corner, serving as a waypoint as the perspective resumes its forward motion. The scene then opens up as the camera passes the woman and a horse-drawn carriage, moving past utility poles and stop signs along the tree-lined, muddy street. Finally, the view expands toward a wide crossroads where a streetcar becomes prominent against a backdrop of brick buildings and mist.
